tools.name: entity_lookup
tools.description: Look up any business entity by name, CIF/NIF, EU VAT, or LEI. Free callers receive a trace-level identity preview; authenticated callers receive the full paid dossier.

tools.name: search_entities
tools.description: Search verified entities across 10 countries by name, keyword, country, or sector. Anonymous callers receive a trace-level preview (name + city); authenticated TRACE+ keys unlock full records.

tools.name: verify_vat
tools.description: Real-time EU VAT validation via VIES (27 countries). Returns {valid, name, address, vat_number, country}.

tools.name: zone_profile
tools.description: Socioeconomic profile of a Spanish postal code — 17 blocks: income, employment, demographics, business census, real estate, FTTH, poverty, tourism.

tools.name: ai_ready_profile
tools.description: Full AI-ready JSON-LD profile for any entity — 4-node @graph (Organization, Place, LocalBusiness, PostalAddress). Designed for direct AI citation.

tools.name: get_competitors
tools.description: Find real competitors in the same sector and geography. Ranked entities with identity + location + sector matching.

tools.name: get_showcase
tools.description: Curated IBEX35 + EU entity examples. FREE — does not consume quota. Use to explore data depth.

tools.name: professional_lookup
tools.description: Verify professional registrations across 24 Spanish health/legal/psychology verticals. Returns colegiado number, college, specialty, status.

tools.name: get_full_dossier
tools.description: Aggregator — 90+ fields about an entity in one call. Combines 4 ENTIA sources in parallel: identity, zone, BORME, VIES. Killer tool for due diligence/KYB.

tools.name: get_platform_stats
tools.description: Live platform stats: entities count, countries, sources, homes published.

tools.name: run_risk_audit
tools.description: Run comprehensive AI-readiness + digital risk audit on any domain. Analyzes SSL, DNS, structured data, LLM visibility. Returns risk score 0-100. 5 req/min, 30s timeout.

tools.name: get_entia_home
tools.description: Retrieve full Schema.org JSON-LD @graph (4 nodes: WebPage, Entity, Verification Report, Territorial Profile) for an entity's Entia Home page.

tools.name: get_entity_home_projection
tools.description: Read the materializer snapshot entia.entity_home_projection.v1 for an Entia Home (claims + projection + policy). Same truth as the public ficha HTML/JSON-LD twin. Serve from R2 sibling .projection.v1.json — no ad-hoc MCP enrichment.

tools.name: lookup_by_domain
tools.description: Look up a business entity by its website domain. STATUS: STUB roadmap (not production). ETA MCP v1.2 — call returns 501 not_implemented.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "lookup_by_domain" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Look up a business entity by its website domain. STATUS: Coming in v1.2 — endpoint not yet deployed." → after: "Look up a business entity by its website domain. STATUS: STUB roadmap (not production). ETA MCP v1.2 — call returns 501 not_implemented."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
